title: Day 11: Phase Change Theory

sections.title: Introduction to Phase Change
subsections: Phase change base class: Base class for all phase change models

sections.title: Lee Model for Mass Transfer
subsections: Mass transfer rate calculation: m_dot = alpha × Y × C × |nabla alpha|

sections.title: Latent Heat Calculations
subsections: Latent heat fraction: Lfraction = kappa2 / (kappa1 + kappa2)
Phase change temperature: Tchange = T1 if m_dot > 0, T2 if m_dot < 0, (T1 + T2)/2 if m_dot = 0

sections.title: Energy Equation with Phase Change
subsections: Direct enthalpy transfer: Energy source terms: direct m_dot × h
Latent heat source term for Phase 1: -(1 - Lfraction) × m_dot × L
Latent heat source term for Phase 2: -Lfraction × m_dot × L

sections.title: The Expansion Term
subsections: Volume change: nabla dot U = m_dot (1/rho_v - 1/rho_l)

verified_facts: phaseChange base class: Base class for all phase change models (file: phaseChange.H)
efficient_phase_change: m_dot/alpha = C × alpha × |nabla alpha| (rate per unit volume fraction)
total rate: m_dot = alpha × Y × C × |nabla alpha|
Latent heat: L = h2_i - h1_i (file: phaseChange.C:410-444)
Phase change temperature: Tchange = T1 if m_dot > 0, T2 if m_dot < 0, (T1 + T2)/2 otherwise (file: phaseChange.C:370-397)
Latent heat fraction: Lfraction = kappa2 / (kappa1 + kappa2) (file: phaseChange.C:400-407)
Energy source terms: direct m_dot × h, latent -(1-Lfraction) × m_dot × L for phase 1, -Lfraction × m_dot × L for phase 2 (file: phaseChange.C:528-599)
Expansion term: nabla dot U = m_dot (1/rho_v - 1/rho_l) - Critical for pressure-velocity coupling in phase change flows
